svg.text: ECO-SIM: Bat × Night Flora - Chiropterophily Clock
Nocturnal pollination: Glossophaga/Anoura bats on 4 chiropterophilous guilds

g.text: Bats leave karst roosts at dusk on traplines.
Blooms keep nectar available across seasons.
Pollination needs roost access and floral
overlap; drought or lighting can cut visits.
Snout and chest pollen moves between crowns.
Peak month: JUL | Top guild: Pequi-noturno
